data.title: Bybit Quest to Reclaim $1.3B: Chasing Hack Funds and ETH Rollback
data.description:
Bybit CEO Ben Zhou has vowed to pursue every recovery option after a cyberattack linked to the Lazarus Group siphoned over $1.4 billion from the exchange. After a hacker seized an Ethereum cold wallet February 21, Zhou outlined the exchange’s response during an X Spaces session the next day. He explained that their plan involves launching a bounty program, partnering with law enforcement, and...
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/02/24/bybit-quest-to-reclaim-1-3b-chasing-hack-funds-and-eth-rollback/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=bybit-quest-to-reclaim-1-3b-chasing-hack-funds-and-eth-rollback

data.title: South Dakota Bitcoin Reserve Bill Set For Committee Hearing
data.description: According to Odaily, a Bitcoin reserve bill in South Dakota is scheduled for a hearing today in the Commerce and Energy Committee. The bill's progress is being closely monitored as it could have significant implications for the state's approach to cryptocurrency regulation.

data.title: South Dakota’s Bitcoin Reserve Bill to Have Hearing in Commerce and Energy Committee
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to Bitcoin Magazine, South Dakota's Bitcoin Reserve Act will hold a hearing in the Commerce and Energy Committee today.

data.title: LBank has launched SHADOW U-margined perpetual contract
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank has launched the SHADOW U-based perpetual contract at 19:30 (SGT) on February 24, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50 times.

data.title: Bitcoin Pepe price prediction as Raydium (RAY) plunges 30%
data.description:
Raydium (RAY), the Solana-based automated market maker (AMM) and liquidity provider, has seen the price of its native token plummet more than 30% in 24 hours. While RAY price may dip further amid Pump.fun developments, analysts are taking a bullish outlook on Bitcoin Pepe (BPEP), a meme coin project looking to build “Solana on Bitcoin”. […]
The post Bitcoin Pepe price prediction as Raydium...
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/bitcoin-pepe-price-prediction-as-raydium-ray-plunges-30/

data.title: Dogecoin Activity Levels Crash To 4-Month Lows, Does This Spell Doom For The Meme Coin?
data.description:
Crypto analyst Ali Martinez has revealed a bearish on-chain metric for Dogecoin, sparking a negative outlook for the foremost meme coin. Based on this, DOGE could be at risk of suffering further price declines.  Dogecoin’s Activity Levels Crash To 4-Month Lows In an X post, Martinez revealed that Dogecoin’s network activity has dropped to its lowest level since October 2024, with just 66 whale...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/dogecoin-activity-crash/

data.title: Musk: A major Grok update will be released on the evening of February 25
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Musk announced on the X platform that a major update to the Grok voice mode will be launched tomorrow night (February 25). (Jinshi)

data.title: pump.fun's revenue in the past 7 days surpassed Tron and ranked third
data.description: According to DeFiLlama data, pump.fun's revenue in the past 7 days reached 14.76 million US dollars, and Tron's revenue in the past 7 days reached 11.42 million US dollars. Pump.fun's revenue in the past 7 days has surpassed Tron and ranked third.
